sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Financial Institutions Posts Strong Q4 2025 Earnings Turnaround
feed.summary: Financial Institutions, Inc. (FISI) reported a strong turnaround for Q4 and full-year 2025, with significant net income, record net interest income, and improved margins. The company demonstrated growth in loans and deposits, strengthened its capital through new debt issuance, and repurchased shares. Despite some challenges, analyst sentiment points to a moderate outlook with potential for recovery.

feed.title: FIS Announces Increase to Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: FIS (NYSE: FIS), a financial services technology leader, has announced a 10 percent increase to its regular quarterly dividend, raising it to $0.44 per common share. The dividend will be payable on March 24, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 10, 2026. This move reflects the company's commitment to returning value to its shareholders.

feed.title: Las Vegas Sands (LVS) tumbles 14% as Macau ops disappoint
feed.summary: This article reports that Las Vegas Sands (LVS) stock experienced a 14% drop due to disappointing performance from its Macau operations. This decline indicates investor concern regarding the company's significant presence in the Macau gaming market and its impact on overall financial results.

feed.title: Muted Q3 show leads analysts to retain 'Sell' on Colgate-Palmolive India
feed.summary: Market analysts have maintained 'Sell' ratings on Colgate-Palmolive (India) after the company reported subdued Q3 FY26 growth. Brokerages Emkay Global and ICICI Securities cited persistent volume pressures, structural challenges in the oral care category, and limited visible growth, which is largely driven by mix and cost controls rather than broad-based volume recovery. Both firms have trimmed earnings estimates and set target prices of ₹1,800 and ₹2,000, respectively, due to an unfavorable risk-reward outlook.

feed.title: L3Harris Technologies (LHX) Net Margin Steady At 7.3% Reinforces Measured Bullish Narratives
feed.summary: L3Harris Technologies (LHX) reported a steady net margin of 7.3% for FY 2025, with revenue of US$21.9 billion and net income of US$1.6 billion. While five-year earnings growth has been modest at 1.2% annually, recent growth over the last year reached 7.1%, supported by stable margins. Investors are weighing the company's valuation, which includes a P/E close to the industry average but above peers, against forecast earnings growth of 15.2% and a high level of debt.

feed.title: Sherwin Williams (SHW) Margin Compression Challenges Premium 34x P E Narrative
feed.summary: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) closed FY 2025 with Q4 revenue of US$5.59 billion and EPS of US$1.94, while trailing net margins softened from 11.6% to 10.9%. Despite revenue growth, net income in Q4 2025 was slightly below the prior year, indicating profit pressure. The company trades at a premium 34x P/E, significantly above its peers and a DCF fair value of US$77.19, raising concerns for investors given its high debt levels and softening profitability.

feed.title: Eric Richard Remer Sells 8,268 Shares of EverCommerce (NASDAQ:EVCM) Stock
feed.summary: EverCommerce CEO Eric Richard Remer recently sold 8,268 shares of the company's stock for approximately $98,802.60, reducing his stake by 0.30% to 2,706,308 shares. This sale is part of a series of transactions where he has sold roughly 89,429 shares in recent weeks, totaling about $1.07 million. Institutional investors have adjusted their holdings in EVCM, while analysts currently hold a "Reduce" rating with an average target price of $11.00.

feed.title: Here's Why Gold Fields (GFI) Fell More Than Broader Market
feed.summary: Gold Fields (GFI) shares dropped 4.71% in the latest session, underperforming the S&P 500, which fell 0.13%. Despite this recent dip, the gold miner's stock had gained 40.88% over the past month. Investors are keenly awaiting its upcoming earnings report, with Zacks Consensus Estimates projecting significant year-over-year increases in both earnings and revenue, while the stock currently holds a Zacks Rank of #3 (Hold) and trades at a valuation discount to its industry.

feed.title: Bitcoin Mining vs. AI w/ Will Foxley
feed.summary: This podcast episode features Alex Thorn and Will Foxley discussing topics including Blockspace's OP_NEXT conferences, Bitcoin development, crypto media, and the perceived threat of quantum computers to Bitcoin. Additionally, Alex and Beimnet Abebe from Galaxy Trading analyze the Federal Reserve Open Markets Committee meeting results, interest rates, and the deteriorating investment environment.

feed.title: Inter Parfums Secures Long-Term Global Nautica Fragrance License
feed.summary: Inter Parfums has signed a 20-year global licensing agreement with Nautica for fragrances, effective January 1, 2030. This deal is expected to expand Nautica's fragrance offerings and strengthen Interparfums' presence in the licensed fragrance market. Analysts currently rate IPAR stock as a Hold with an $85.00 price target.

feed.title: :Eastern Bankshares (NASDAQ:EBC) Insider Donald Michael Westermann Sells 21,256 Shares
feed.summary: :Eastern Bankshares (NASDAQ:EBC) Director Donald Michael Westermann sold 21,256 shares of the company's stock on January 28th at an average price of $20.11, totaling $427,458.16. This sale reduced his position by 50.47% to 20,860 shares. The company's stock traded up 2.4% to $20.41, and Eastern Bankshares recently announced a $0.13 quarterly dividend.

feed.title: MarketAxess to Participate in the UBS Financial Services Conference
feed.summary: MarketAxess Holdings Inc. announced that its Chief Financial Officer, Ilene Fiszel Bieler, will participate in the UBS Financial Services Conference on February 9, 2026. She will engage in a fireside chat, which will be webcast live and available for replay on MarketAxess's investor relations homepage. MarketAxess operates a leading electronic trading platform for fixed-income securities.

feed.title: Applied Materials Faces Rich Valuation As AI Fab Spending Accelerates
feed.summary: Applied Materials (NasdaqGS:AMAT) is benefiting from a surge in semiconductor capital spending driven by AI and advanced chip technologies, positioning it as a key supplier for Gate-All-Around transistors and Backside Power Delivery. While the company demonstrates strong recent momentum, its shares are trading 143.2% above estimated fair value and 7.5% above analyst targets, indicating a rich valuation. Investors should monitor insider selling and new orders for next-generation fabs, as a multi-year buildout in advanced fabs could provide long-term visibility for demand.

feed.title: Bombardier, General Dynamics Caught In Crosshairs Of Trump's New Tariff Fury On Canada Over Business Jets
feed.summary: Former President Donald Trump has announced his intention to decertify Bombardier Global Express business jets, citing Canada's alleged refusal to certify General Dynamics' Gulfstream jets. This move could lead to a new trade dispute, potentially affecting Canadian aerospace exports and U.S. defense companies. Trump also threatened a 50% tariff on Canadian aircraft if the certification issue is not resolved, and a 100% tariff on Canadian goods if Canada proceeds with a trade deal with China.

feed.title: First Business Financial Services (NASDAQ:FBIZ) Q4 2025 Earnings: EPS Beats, Revenue Misses, Dividend Raised 17%
feed.summary: First Business Financial Services (NASDAQ:FBIZ) reported mixed Q4 2025 results, with diluted EPS of $1.58 surpassing analyst estimates of $1.42, while operating revenue of $42.2 million missed expectations of $43.9 million. The company announced a 17% increase in its quarterly cash dividend to $0.34 per share, marking its 14th consecutive annual dividend increase. Despite a revenue miss and an increase in non-performing assets, the stock's market reaction was muted as investors balanced positive EPS and dividend news.

feed.title: Unity, Appian, Box, Domo, and Palo Alto Networks Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
feed.summary: Shares of Unity, Appian, Box, Domo, and Palo Alto Networks declined in the afternoon session following a broad sell-off in the software sector. This market reaction was triggered by mixed earnings reports from industry leaders SAP and ServiceNow, which raised concerns about cloud backlog, revenue outlook, and the potential impact of AI-related costs on enterprise software profits. The news fueled broader fears that AI is transforming the sector faster than companies can adapt, leading to a fall in the S&P 500 Software and Services Index.

feed.title: Schwab creates 'organization' for Neesha Hathi to head up at intersection of wealth and banking, after Rick Wurster identifies it as the 'No. 1 thing' from RIAs -- analysts say not so much
feed.summary: Schwab has appointed Neesha Hathi to lead a new organization focused on the intersection of wealth management and banking. This move follows Rick Wurster's identification of this area as a top priority for RIAs. However, analysts appear to be skeptical of the necessity or impact of this new initiative.

feed.title: Costco Sued Over 'No Preservatives' Roast Chicken Ads
feed.summary: Costco Wholesale Corp. is facing a proposed class action lawsuit in California federal court, accused of falsely advertising its popular $4.99 rotisserie chicken as "preservative free." The lawsuit, filed by consumers from California, alleges that the chicken contains sodium phosphate and carrageenan, which function as preservatives. This legal challenge highlights concerns about food labeling and consumer protection regarding product claims.

feed.title: Navigating USA’s Fast-Changing AI Regulatory Landscape
feed.summary: The US AI regulatory landscape is rapidly evolving, moving from an innovation-focused federal approach to a more fragmented state-driven system. Organizations need to shift from reactive compliance to proactive AI readiness, as enforcement is expected before uniform federal guidelines are established. Key states like Colorado and California are setting de facto national standards, and accountability for AI risks is shifting to enterprise leadership.

feed.title: Southwest Airlines (LUV) Q4 Revenue Strength Tests High P/E Growth Narrative
feed.summary: Southwest Airlines reported Q4 2025 revenue of US$7.4 billion and a full-year net profit margin of 1.6%. Despite five-year earnings growth of 48.2% annually, recent growth has slowed, and the company's P/E ratio of 56.9x is significantly higher than peers, raising concerns about its valuation. The article highlights a tension between bullish expectations for future growth and conservative views on thin profitability and declining load factors.

feed.title: Boston Scientific stock snaps a 4-day run — what to watch before Feb. 4 earnings
feed.summary: Boston Scientific's stock fell 1.6% on Thursday, ending a four-day rally, as the company completed its acquisition of Nalu Medical. Investors are now focused on the upcoming Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings report on Feb. 4, especially regarding how recent major acquisitions, including the $14.5 billion Penumbra deal, will impact finances and future guidance. The earnings call will also shed light on integration plans and potential future acquisition strategies.

feed.title: Huntington Bancshares Raises $1.75 Billion in Debt Offering
feed.summary: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) has successfully completed a $1.75 billion debt offering, consisting of $1.0 billion in fixed-to-floating rate senior notes due 2032 and $750 million in fixed-to-fixed rate subordinated notes due 2041. This move reflects the company's strategy to secure long-term funding and manage its capital structure. Analysts currently rate HBAN a "Buy" with a $21.00 price target, and TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, considers it an "Outperform" due to strong financial performance, a positive earnings outlook, and a supportive valuation.

feed.title: FinWise Bancorp (NASDAQ:FINW) Reports Mixed Q4 2025 Results with Revenue Beat and EPS Miss
feed.summary: FinWise Bancorp (NASDAQ:FINW) reported mixed Q4 2025 results, exceeding revenue expectations with $46.85 million but missing EPS estimates at $0.27 compared to $0.35. The company demonstrated strong growth, including record loan originations and a significant expansion in its credit-enhanced loan portfolio, leading to an expanded net interest margin. Despite a neutral market reaction, FinWise Bancorp highlighted its strategic shift towards a more capital-efficient lending model, with investors now watching for improved bottom-line performance.

feed.title: Form 424B2 BARCLAYS BANK PLC
feed.summary: Barclays Bank PLC has filed Form 424B2 for Barrier Digital Notes due March 4, 2027, linked to the performance of the Nasdaq-100, Russell 2000, and S&P 500 Indices. These notes do not pay interest and do not guarantee the full principal at maturity, offering a fixed return if the least performing underlier does not decline below its Digital Barrier Value. Investors are exposed to the market risk of each underlier, and any payment is subject to Barclays Bank PLC's creditworthiness and the risk of a U.K. Bail-in Power exercise.

feed.title: |【即時新聞】FGSI ETF公告月配息0.1435美元！預估年化殖利率達8.54%受矚目
feed.summary: |FT Vest Growth Strength & Target Income ETF (FGSI) announced a monthly dividend of $0.1435 per share, resulting in an estimated annualized yield of 8.54%. The ex-dividend date and record date were both January 21st, with the cash dividend expected to be paid on January 30th. This announcement highlights FGSI's competitive income potential for investors.

feed.title: First Business Financial Services (FBIZ) Q4 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
feed.summary: First Business Financial Services (FBIZ) reported Q4 2025 revenues of $42.22 million, representing a 2.6% increase year-over-year, and an EPS of $1.58, exceeding the consensus estimate by 14.7%. While revenue slightly missed analyst estimates, key metrics such as efficiency ratio and net interest margin provided a deeper insight into the company's financial health. The stock holds a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) and has shown a 2.1% return over the past month.

feed.title: TKO Group officer Krauss sells $455k in class A common stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: Seth D. Krauss, Chief Administrative Officer & Senior Counsel at TKO Group Holdings, Inc., sold 2,271 shares of Class A Common Stock for a total of $455,801 on January 27, 2026. This transaction was executed under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan and leaves Krauss with no direct ownership in the company. Concurrently, BTIG raised TKO's price target to $250 with a Buy rating due to strong 2025 performance and future growth projections.

feed.title: News Corp Reports Progress on US$1bn Share Repurchase, Excludes ASX CDIs
feed.summary: News Corp is moving forward with its US$1 billion share repurchase program, targeting its Nasdaq-listed Class A and B common stock. The company explicitly stated that it will not buy back any ASX-listed CDIs, ensuring the Australian depository interest float remains unchanged. This strategy focuses on capital management for its U.S.-listed equity.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks stock drops after Chronosphere deal closes, with earnings next in focus
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks shares dropped 4.8% after finalizing its acquisition of observability platform Chronosphere, signaling investor skepticism ahead of its Feb. 12 earnings report. The deal, valued at $3.35 billion, aims to integrate observability, security, and AI into a single platform, but analysts question the high valuation and potential integration challenges. Investors are keenly awaiting the upcoming earnings call for insights into the deal's impact on growth and margins.

feed.title: News Corp Outlines US$1 Billion Buy-Back of Nasdaq-Listed Shares, Excludes ASX CDIs
feed.summary: News Corp has announced a US$1 billion share repurchase program for its Nasdaq-listed Class A and Class B common stock. This program explicitly excludes buy-backs of its ASX-listed CHESS Depositary Interests (CDIs), focusing capital returns on U.S.-listed stock. An analyst has rated AU:NWS stock as a Buy with a A$64.40 price target.

feed.title: Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) Q4 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
feed.summary: Arthur J. Gallagher (AJG) reported strong Q4 2025 earnings, with revenue reaching $3.59 billion, a 34% year-over-year increase, and EPS at $2.38, up from $2.13 a year ago. The company exceeded Zacks Consensus Estimates for both revenue and EPS. While headline numbers were positive, some key operational metrics, such as compensation and operating expense ratios, were higher than analyst estimates in both the Brokerage and Risk Management segments.

feed.title: Kenvue Shareholder Meeting Shows Strong Support To Accept Kimberly-Clark’s Nearly $50Bn Offer
feed.summary: Kenvue's shareholder meeting indicated strong support for accepting Kimberly-Clark's offer of nearly $50 billion. The article, authored by Malcolm Spicer, highlights the evolving consumer health industry and features discussions with industry leaders. It covers topics such as OTC drugs, cosmetics, M&A deals, and business strategies.

feed.title: RBC Capital Sticks to Their Hold Rating for Oneok (OKE)
feed.summary: RBC Capital maintained its Hold rating on Oneok (OKE) with a price target of $79.00. Analyst Elvira Scotto, who covers the Energy sector, has a solid track record. This comes as Oneok reported strong quarterly revenues of $8.63 billion and a net profit of $939 million for the quarter ending September 30, and corporate insider sentiment is positive with recent share purchases.

feed.title: RBC Capital Sticks to Their Hold Rating for Oneok (OKE)
feed.summary: RBC Capital maintained a Hold rating on Oneok (OKE) with a $79.00 price target, following an analysis by Elvira Scotto. This comes amidst other analyst actions, with J.P. Morgan also issuing a Hold and Morgan Stanley maintaining a Buy rating. Oneok reported strong third-quarter earnings, with significant increases in revenue and net profit compared to the previous year, and positive insider sentiment shown by recent stock purchases.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) Margin Improvement Challenges Long Term Earnings Decline Narrative
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific (TMO) concluded FY 2025 with strong fourth-quarter results, including US$12.2 billion in revenue and US$5.25 basic EPS, with net profit margins slightly up year-over-year at 15%. This recent performance challenges a prior five-year trend of earnings decline, with the latest year showing 5.8% earnings growth. While the P/E ratio is slightly below industry averages, suggesting a modest discount, concerns remain regarding debt coverage by operating cash flow.

feed.title: Akamai and Yospace Deliver Personalised Ads for Japan’s ABEMA
feed.summary: Akamai Technologies and Yospace have renewed their agreement with AbemaTV, Inc., to provide personalized ad experiences for ABEMA, a leading online video streaming service in Japan. This partnership leverages Yospace's server-side ad insertion (SSAI) technology, powered by Akamai's cloud platform, to deliver broadcast-quality, targeted ads seamlessly within live streams. The collaboration aims to enhance viewer experience by providing uninterrupted playback and advanced ad targeting while ensuring scalability and reliability for ABEMA's growing audience.

feed.title: CenterPoint Energy Stock: Quiet Climb, Defensive Power Play in a Jittery Market
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy (CNP) stock has shown a steady upward trend amidst broader market volatility, signaling a shift towards cautious optimism among investors. With a solid dividend and improving earnings visibility, the utility is seen as a defensive play, reflected in its capital gains and total return over the past year. Analysts largely hold a "Buy" or "Overweight" rating, underscoring confidence in its capital investment program, regulatory navigation, and strategic positioning for grid modernization.

feed.title: The Truth About Costco Wholesale Corp.: Why Everyone Is Suddenly Obsessed With This Stock
feed.summary: This article examines the recent surge in popularity of Costco Wholesale Corp. stock, fueled by social media attention and the company's strong business model. It discusses why Costco is considered a premium stock, highlighting its membership-driven revenue, consistent value proposition, and robust market moat. The article advises potential investors to consider if they are looking for a long-term, steady-growth play rather than a quick flip, due to the stock's already high valuation.

feed.title: Kyivstar Announces Pricing Of Secondary Offering Of 12.50 Mln Common Shares At $10.50/shr
feed.summary: Kyivstar Group Ltd. (KYIV, KYIVW) announced the pricing of a secondary public offering of 12.50 million common shares at $10.50 per share. The shares are being sold by VEON Amsterdam B.V. and other selling shareholders, not by Kyivstar itself. The underwriters have a 30-day option to purchase an additional 1,875,000 shares.

feed.title: Kyivstar’s main owner sells 12.5M shares at $10.50 in public sale
feed.summary: Kyivstar Group Ltd. announced the pricing of a secondary public offering where its principal shareholder, VEON Amsterdam B.V., along with other selling shareholders, will sell 12,500,000 common shares at US$10.50 per share. Kyivstar itself is not selling shares or receiving any proceeds. The offering is expected to close on February 2, 2026, and includes a 30-day option for underwriters to purchase up to an additional 1,875,000 shares.

feed.title: Kyivstar Group Ltd. Announces Pricing of Secondary Offering of Common Shares
feed.summary: Kyivstar Group Ltd. announced the pricing of a secondary public offering of 12,500,000 common shares by its principal shareholder, VEON Amsterdam B.V., and other selling shareholders at $10.50 per share. Kyivstar itself is not selling any shares in this offering. The underwriters have a 30-day option to purchase an additional 1,875,000 shares, and the offering is expected to close on February 2, 2026, with Morgan Stanley, Barclays, Cantor, and Rothschild & Co acting as lead managers.

feed.title: Assessing First Hawaiian (FHB) Valuation After Analyst Downgrade And Recent Share Price Outperformance
feed.summary: First Hawaiian (FHB) shares are facing pressure following an analyst downgrade that cited valuation concerns after recent stock outperformance. While one narrative suggests FHB is trading near its fair value of $27.61, implying minimal upside, another valuation model using discounted cash flows indicates a fair value of $50.39, suggesting the stock is significantly undervalued. Investors are left to weigh these differing perspectives and consider potential risks like deposit outflows or rising credit stress.

feed.title: Actelis Networks Adjourns Special Meeting After Lacking Quorum
feed.summary: Actelis Networks (ASNS) adjourned its special shareholders' meeting on January 29, 2026, due to a lack of quorum, preventing a vote on issuing common stock beyond a 19.99% cap with White Lion Capital LLC. This ongoing issue hinders the company's ability to access further equity financing and necessitates another meeting within 90 days. The stock currently holds a "Hold" rating with a $0.46 price target, with TipRanks' AI Analyst Spark rating it "Neutral" due to weak financial performance and bearish technical momentum despite corporate event support.

feed.title: Genesco CFO Harris to step down in March, CEO to assume interim role By Investing.com
feed.summary: Genesco Inc. announced that CFO Cassandra Sandra Harris will step down on March 6, 2026, to pursue other opportunities. CEO Mimi E. Vaughn will serve as Interim Chief Financial Officer as the company searches for a permanent replacement. The footwear retailer's stock has declined by 12.35% over the past week, although analysts anticipate a return to profitability this fiscal year.

feed.title: TKO Group officer Krauss sells $455k in class A common stock
feed.summary: Seth D. Krauss, Chief Administrative Officer & Senior Counsel at TKO Group Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:TKO), sold 2,271 shares of Class A Common Stock for a total of $455,801 on January 27, 2026. These transactions, executed through a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan, resulted in Krauss directly owning zero shares of the company. The sale follows recent positive news for TKO Group, including a price target increase from BTIG due to strong performance and strategic acquisitions.

feed.title: Analysts Have Conflicting Sentiments on These Industrial Goods Companies: Paccar (PCAR), Granite Construction (GVA) and RTX (RTX)
feed.summary: This article examines analyst ratings for three industrial goods companies: Paccar (PCAR), Granite Construction (GVA), and RTX (RTX). While some analysts maintain "Hold" ratings with specific price targets, others, like RBC Capital and Morgan Stanley, have issued "Buy" ratings, indicating a mixed but generally positive outlook from the analyst community for these stocks.

feed.title: Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY) Declined in Line with Broader Industry Downturn
feed.summary: This article discusses Jack Henry & Associates (JKHY) stock decline, attributing it to a broader industry downturn. It highlights key financial metrics and analyst ratings.

feed.title: Assessing Automatic Data Processing (ADP) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
feed.summary: Automatic Data Processing (ADP) has experienced recent share price weakness, with a 5% drop over the past month and 17% over the last year, prompting a reassessment of its valuation. Despite the pullback, a popular narrative suggests ADP is 36.6% undervalued, with a fair value of $387.77 against its current price of $245.97, attributing this to steady growth in HR cloud platforms, resilient margins, and its role as critical workforce infrastructure. However, potential risks like slower adoption of new platforms or increased competition could challenge this undervalued perception.

feed.title: IShares MSCI Emerging Markets ETF Options Spot-On: On January 29th, 658.12K Contracts Were Traded, With 5.22 Million Open Interest
feed.summary: On January 29th, the iShares MSCI Emerging Markets ETF (EEM.US) saw significant options trading activity with 658.12K contracts traded. Call options represented 58.71% of these transactions, and the open interest reached 5.22 million contracts, exceeding the 30-day average by 105.05%. A notable trade involved 33,500 call options with a strike price of $63.00 expiring on March 20th, 2026, when EEM was trading at $60.10.

feed.title: Analysts Offer Insights on Technology Companies: Celestica (CLS) and Automatic Data Processing (ADP)
feed.summary: Analysts from TD Cowen have issued neutral "Hold" ratings for technology companies Celestica (CLS) and Automatic Data Processing (ADP). For Celestica, analyst John Shao set a price target of $305.00, while Bryan Bergin maintained a $255.00 price target for Automatic Data Processing. Both companies currently hold a consensus analyst rating of "Moderate Buy" or "Hold" with potential upsides from their current share prices.
